title: BigNumberReveal
description: Dramatic reveal of a large statistic or number. Supports count-up, pop, typewriter, and fade animations.

label.description: Optional label displayed below the number (e.g., 'bits per second')

emphasis.description: Emphasis level — controls color and animation intensity

animation.description: Animation type. 'pop': scale-up. 'countUp': animate from countFrom to number. 'typewriter': chars appear one by one. 'fade': simple fade in.

color.description: Optional color override. Theme keys (primary, secondary, accentGreen, etc.) or hex/rgb.

useCase.description: Dramatic statistic or number reveal for impact moments
useCase.when: Use when presenting a key statistic, milestone, or impressive number
useCase.notFor: Counting sequences — use animatedCounter for smooth number counting

sizingBehavior.description: BigNumberReveal centers the number vertically and horizontally within the slot
sizingBehavior.width: Number fills available width with auto-scaled font size
sizingBehavior.fontScaling: Font size scales with slot dimensions; larger on mobile
